Off Calendar May-15-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Case is ordered dismissed pursuant to CCP Sections 583.310 and 583.360. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031 (212)

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.

Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Karissa Shaw, Reporter: Vicki Gross.

Gregory Henry, Esq. for Plaintiff: Abraham Granados, present, was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court denies the matter without prejudice.
